criteria.description: 8-row device table sourced from /api/system/devices; per-row status via accessible indicator.
criteria.evidence: 2-commit branch shape (feat + docs); 162/162 Python+invariant + 32/32 e2e green on main after cherry-pick. Feat committed by orchestrator after agent exited on /simplify handoff; implementation + simplify edits are present in the feat commit as designed.

notes: Third occurrence of /simplify-handoff exit under new runbook. 4/5 solo runs have been clean; this one broke — possibly correlated with richer simplify edits making the skill's review output feel more terminal. WRAPUP_SENTINEL didn't protect because exit happened before the feat commit even landed. Next hardening direction: reframe /simplify output in the prompt as 'tool result' with explicit 'your VERY NEXT tool call is Bash' direction.
